allow: Bash(find core llm documentation -name "*.py" -type f -exec sh -c 'wc -l ""$1"" | grep -q ""^0 "" && echo ""$1 \(empty\)""' _ {} ;)
Bash(pip install -q lxml pydantic python-dotenv pyyaml rich networkx)

Bash(python -c "from core.llm_client import LLMClient; client = LLMClient\(\); print\(''✓ LLM client initialized successfully''\); print\(f''Provider: {client.provider}''\); print\(f''Model: {client.model}''\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; data = json.load\(open\(''output/layer2_enriched.json''\)\); endpoints = set\(\); [endpoints.add\(step.get\(''endpoint'', ''''\)\) for suite in data.get\(''test_suites'', []\) for tc in suite.get\(''test_cases'', []\) for step in tc.get\(''steps'', []\) if step.get\(''endpoint''\)]; print\(''Unique Endpoints:''\); [print\(f''  - {ep}''\) for ep in sorted\(endpoints\) if ep]")

Bash(python -c "import json; from core.api_inventory_analyzer import APIInventoryAnalyzer; data = json.load\(open\(''output/layer2_enriched.json''\)\); analyzer = APIInventoryAnalyzer\(data\); inventory = analyzer.analyze\(\); print\(''✓ Endpoints:'', len\(inventory[''endpoints'']\)\); print\(''✓ Operations:'', len\(inventory[''operations'']\)\); print\(''✓ Queues:'', len\(inventory[''queues'']\)\); print\(''✓ Scripts:'', len\(inventory[''external_scripts'']\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; from core.api_inventory_analyzer import APIInventoryAnalyzer; data = json.load\(open\(''output/layer2_enriched.json''\)\); analyzer = APIInventoryAnalyzer\(data\); inventory = analyzer.analyze\(\); print\(''Endpoints:'', len\(inventory[''endpoints'']\)\); print\(''Operations:'', len\(inventory[''operations'']\)\); print\(''Queues:'', len\(inventory[''queues'']\)\); print\(''Scripts:'', len\(inventory[''external_scripts'']\)\); print\(''Statistics:'', inventory[''statistics'']\)")

Bash(python -c "from lxml import etree; tree = etree.parse\(''input/Amazon-soapui-project.xml''\); ns = {''con'': ''http://eviware.com/soapui/config''}; suites = tree.xpath\(''//con:testSuite'', namespaces=ns\); print\(f''Test Suites found: {len\(suites\)}''\); [print\(f""  Suite: {s.get\(''name''\)} - Test Cases: {len\(s.xpath\(''.//con:testCase'', namespaces=ns\)\)}""\) for s in suites]")

Bash(python -c "from lxml import etree; tree = etree.parse\(''input/Amazon-soapui-project.xml''\); ns = {''con'': ''http://eviware.com/soapui/config''}; steps = tree.xpath\(''//con:testStep'', namespaces=ns\); print\(f''Total Test Steps: {len\(steps\)}''\); suites = tree.xpath\(''//con:testSuite'', namespaces=ns\); [print\(f""\\nSuite: {s.get\(''name''\)}""\) or [print\(f""  TestCase: {tc.get\(''name''\)} - Steps: {len\(tc.xpath\(''.//con:testStep'', namespaces=ns\)\)}""\) for tc in s.xpath\(''.//con:testCase'', namespaces=ns\)] for s in suites]")

Bash(python -c "from lxml import etree; tree = etree.parse\(''input/Amazon-soapui-project.xml''\); ns = {''con'': ''http://eviware.com/soapui/config''}; ops = tree.xpath\(''//con:operation'', namespaces=ns\); print\(f''SOAP Operations Defined: {len\(ops\)}''\); [print\(f''  - {op.get\(""name""\)}''\) for op in ops]; print\(f''\\nTest Suites: {len\(tree.xpath\(""//con:testSuite"", namespaces=ns\)\)}''\); print\(f''Test Cases: {len\(tree.xpath\(""//con:testCase"", namespaces=ns\)\)}''\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; data = json.load\(open\(''output/layer2_enriched.json''\)\); print\(''Project:'', data.get\(''project'', {}\).get\(''name'', ''N/A''\)\); print\(''Test Suites:'', len\(data.get\(''test_suites'', []\)\)\); suites = data.get\(''test_suites'', []\); print\(''First suite name:'', suites[0].get\(''name''\) if suites else ''N/A''\); print\(''Test cases in first suite:'', len\(suites[0].get\(''test_cases'', []\)\) if suites else 0\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; data = json.load\(open\(''output/layer2_filtered.json''\)\); print\(''Keys:'', list\(data.keys\(\)\)\); print\(''Test Suites:'', len\(data.get\(''test_suites'', []\)\)\); suites = data.get\(''test_suites'', []\); print\(''First suite:'', suites[0] if suites else ''Empty''\)")

Bash(python -c "from docx import Document; doc = Document\(''output/soapui_documentation.docx''\); paras = [p.text for p in doc.paragraphs if p.text.strip\(\)]; print\(f''Total paragraphs with text: {len\(paras\)}''\); print\(f''First 5 paragraphs:''\); for i, p in enumerate\(paras[:5]\): print\(f''{i+1}. {p[:100]}...'' if len\(p\) > 100 else f''{i+1}. {p}''\)")

Bash(python -c "
from core.postman_to_json import PostmanToJSONConverter, detect_format
import json

# Test detection
fmt = detect_format\(''input/sample-postman-collection.json''\)
print\(f''Detected format: {fmt}''\)

# Test conversion
converter = PostmanToJSONConverter\(''input/sample-postman-collection.json''\)
result = converter.convert\(\)

print\(f''\\nProject: {result[""project""][""name""]}''\)
print\(f''Type: {result[""project""][""type""]}''\)
print\(f''Test Suites: {len\(result[""test_suites""]\)}''\)

for suite in result[''test_suites'']:
    print\(f''\\n  Suite: {suite[""name""]}''\)
    print\(f''  Test Cases: {len\(suite[""test_cases""]\)}''\)
    for tc in suite[''test_cases'']:
        print\(f''    - {tc[""name""]} \({len\(tc[""test_steps""]\)} steps\)''\)
")

Bash(python -c "
from core.postman_to_json import detect_format

# Test auto-detection
soapui_file = ''input/small_soapui_project.xml''
postman_file = ''input/sample-postman-collection.json''

print\(''Testing auto-detection:''\)
print\(f''  {soapui_file} -> {detect_format\(soapui_file\)}''\)
print\(f''  {postman_file} -> {detect_format\(postman_file\)}''\)
print\(''\\n✅ Auto-detection working!''\)
")
